title: Bellemere Chooses Her Daughters
scene: On pages 0–3, Nojiko’s account of the past reveals how Nami, Bellemere, and Cocoyasi Village were damaged by Arlong’s arrival. Bellemere chooses to acknowledge Nami and Nojiko as her daughters, even when it costs her life.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Did I just hear you right,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Little Miss Delinguent?

dialogue.speaker: Bellemere
dialogue.text: I've decided to be these girls' mother!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What!? That's crazy! It's reckless! We won't say anything bad so just give them to the government to worry about!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Shut your traps! I've already made my decision! I'll raise these girls myself!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm an adult, I can do what I want! Besides, I've straightened up a bit ever since I joined the marines!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I want to be responsible for these girls,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And raise them up to be fine women who won't give in even during these chaotic times!

dialogue.speaker: Child Nami
dialogue.text: You never learn, do you, you little cat burglar!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Let me go! I promise I'll pay for it next time!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: with my body. (1)

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Don't go around learning idiotic lines!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Jeez, did you two make the boys cry again?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But they started it!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's fine, Belliemere. It's just a little kid's fight.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: They said that Belliemere's oranges tasted bad!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Why you little brat!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Belliemere!

dialogue.speaker: Child Nami
dialogue.text: Nojiko! Nami! Don't let anyone beat you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Even girls have to be strong!

summary: This part deepens Nami’s backstory, showing how family, money, and survival became tied to Arlong’s control over the village.
